allow: Bash(FILTER_BRANCH_SQUELCH_WARNING=1 git filter-branch -f --tree-filter 'if [ -f k8s/secrets-gcp.yaml ]; then sed -i "" "s/sk-ant-[a-zA-Z0-9_-]*[^\\"]/sk-ant-YOUR-KEY-HERE/g" k8s/secrets-gcp.yaml && sed -i "" "s/y+9umHSOAeU3s9wTkAUKoe+e5bFDEVy+/YOUR-PASSWORD-HERE/g" k8s/secrets-gcp.yaml && sed -i "" "s/9eea20eeb1467990fd6fe673b3e07480c92c6384d22897d7683286f49e78edbf/YOUR-SECRET-HERE/g" k8s/secrets-gcp.yaml; fi' -- --all)

Bash(FILTER_BRANCH_SQUELCH_WARNING=1 git filter-branch -f --msg-filter 'sed "s/🤖 Generated with \\[Claude Code\\]\(https:\\/\\/claude\\.com\\/claude-code\)//g" | sed "s/Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>//g" | sed "/^$/N;/^\\n$/!P;D"' -- --all)
